title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 84.095 - Venue for actions against St. Louis police commissioners
text:
84.095.  Venue for actions against St. Louis police commissioners. — All causes of action against the members of the St. Louis board of police commissioners in their official capacity shall be commenced in the circuit court of the City of St. Louis.
(L. 1997 H.B. 69 & 179 & H.B. 669 § 1)
